verified.name: Señor Bear
verified._notes: LoHi. Latin American kitchen and cocktail bar. Named one of Denver's 38 Essential Restaurants.

verified.name: El Five
verified._notes: LoHi rooftop. Spanish/Mediterranean tapas. Part of Justin Cucci's Edible Beats group.

verified.name: Tamayo
verified._notes: Larimer Square. Richard Sandoval restaurant. 100+ agave spirits, craft margaritas since 2001.

verified.name: El Camino Community Tavern
verified._notes: Highland (NOT Jefferson Park). Established 2008. Known for margaritas and green chile.

verified.name: Mezcal
verified._notes: Colfax. Denver's original cantina and tequila bar. Established 2003.

verified.name: Tacos Tequila Whiskey
verified._notes: Highlands location. Colfax flagship CLOSED Feb 2024 — this is the surviving Denver location.

verified.name: Los Dos Potrillos
verified._notes: Opened April 2025 — first Denver location. Award-winning margaritas.

dropped.name: Tacos Tequila Whiskey (Colfax)
dropped.details: Flagship Colfax location at 1514 York St closed February 24, 2024. Replaced by Rolling Pin Pizza (also since closed).

dropped.name: Ophelia's Electric Soapbox
dropped.details: Live music venue with cocktails; not a destination margarita bar. Kept out per strict category rule.
